text.p: I hereby write to felicitate you on your recent electrral sucesess which paved the way for your elevation to the exalted office of the chairman of the newly caryed out local government council. Once again, accept my profound and sincere felicitation for your well-deserved golory. Let me se-ize this opportunity to wish you a fuitful and pur- poiseful tenure of office during which you shall lay a solid fundation for the rapid development of our locality particularly my community.

Sir the area of our need is good road cons-truction. as all know in our locality village as the food basket of this local government , deserves a good network of well tarred roads. These roads well ensure that the products of the local cottage cottage Industries and the abundent farm product get to the buyers and consumers autside our vi-llage fast and cheap too. This dream can only meterialize when new roads are constructed and the existing ones repaired to make them motorable all season. Consequenses of lack of good road to our village , have not let the whole village to sell their last year farm product.
Sir my community is pleading to you to use this opportunity of your office to constructed our road. Thank you.
